title: Didn't feel like they wanted my company as a customer.
text:
Started a free trial. Unfortunatetly, didn't have time to explore the product during this brief period.  I tried to extend the free trial, but was asked to leave reviews to do so, which I thought was silly as I haven't even used the product yet.

I asked my 'account manager' Dale May for an extension on a Friday, and he extended it until Monday.  I don't work weekends - when I came in Monday morning, trial had expired again.  Useless.

It can clearly be seen that I have yet to use the free trial, so why they did not try and extend was beyond me, as would have been more than happy to sign up if I liked the software.

title: Trying to get them to call you back…
text: Trying to get them to call you back seems to take forever.  It doesn't matter if it's sales or support.  It appears to be a poorly run company and I don't know if they are under capitalize, growing too fast or just very poorly run.  I'd be very careful before you spend much time with this compay.

title: Very poor experience!!!!
text: Very poor experience!!!!! After fully setting up the system and investing significant effort into configuring everything, I was forced into unnecessary and contradictory verification steps despite having a legitimate U.S. business identity. Even after providing all requested documents, I was told I must establish an additional business entity in the country I reside in — a requirement that is absolutely not true. This left me no choice but to downgrade my account, yet no refund was issued. Overall, a very unprofessional experience. I also encountered significant technical problems while using the platform. There are many other alternatives offering better solutions at a better price. Not recommended.

title: So easy to use
text: So easy to use, very accurate with updates that load in seamlessly. I am blown away how easy to use and the reports you can generate that are very relative to your business. The follow ups and the ease of logging in each time so quick you can log in wherever you are. I highly recommend ZOHO invoicing  and Zoho over all the training tutorials are a bonus. Thank you Zoho

title: Unreliable for long-term use
text: I hired the Zoho Creator platform years ago. At the time of the contract, there were options available to purchase more 'space,' referred to by the platform as 'records,' along with a variety of other features. Over the years, Zoho removed these options and is now offering me an upgrade at a cost 4.5 times higher. This makes Zoho highly unreliable for long-term use.

title: Zoho Rep lacking accountability
text: I scheduled demo with a Zoho rep but there was a no-show by Zoho.  There was no communication beforehand for a reschedule which makes me worry if their service levels are lacking for customers

title: "Looking to streamline your social…
text: "Looking to streamline your social media management? Look no further than Zoho Social! This platform offers a range of tools to schedule posts, engage with your audience, and analyze performance. Take your social media game to the next level with Zoho Social! 🚀 hashtag#SocialMediaManagement hashtag#ZohoSocial"

title: Effective software, VERY SLOW customer support.
text: The system is effective, However in having such a broad range software, the customer support is severely lacking. Don't bother adding on the "premium support" option. There is nothing premium about it, their resolution and response speed times are no different than the regular support (which is pretty slow).

title: QuickBooks Online Integration is a plus
text: We have used Quickbooks Online in the past for expenses and receipt submission.  Zoho has made that task way easier.

title: Easy to use and great reporting tools
text: Really easy to create and keep track of my scheduled posts, then to get feedback on their performance all in the one place has saved me lots of time and makes presenting the performance a lot easier.

title: A great experience
text: We have enjoyed the experience at every turn. The collaboration with other team members has been easy and work gets done quickly. Customer service is top notch, as well.

title: i am enjoying zoho social
text: i am enjoying zoho social

title: It saved me tons of time. I have been using Zoho for the past…
text: I have been using Zoho for the past couple of months, and it saved me tons of time and made my life easy. It got amazing features, quite flexible and most important it got AI enabled features....ZOHO is amount the top 3 Social Media Apps or tools, if not the no#1 application with loads of features. Thanks Zoho guys, keep improving....

title: Zoho Social is a dedicated social media…
text:
Zoho Social is a dedicated social media management platform that helps businesses and individuals alike to effectively manage their social media presence across multiple platforms, whether you're a small business owner, a social media manager, or someone curious about managing social platforms more efficiently.

Throughout this guide, we’ll take a deep dive into the features and functionalities of Zoho Social, offering you a well-rounded understanding to kickstart your social media management with confidence.

 Let's dive into the heart of Zoho Social—the interface that houses a collection of impressive features and tools designed to make social media management a breeze.

Starting with the interface, you’ll find it sleek and user-friendly.

As soon as you log in, you're greeted with a dashboard that gives you an overview of all your connected social media accounts and their performance.

One of the key features is the live stream, which provides real-time updates from your social media channels, allowing you to engage with your audience as interactions happen.

Additionally, the publishing calendar helps plan and schedule posts, ensuring that your content is consistent and timely.

Another noteworthy feature is the reporting tool, which provides detailed analytics for each of your social media accounts.

This enhances your capability to understand your audience and tailor your strategies accordingly.

As you navigate through these tools, you'll appreciate how Zoho Social organizes everything to enhance your workflow.

Navigating through Zoho Social becomes a straightforward task over time.

Not only is it equipped with advanced functionalities, but its intuitive design makes it accessible for users of all levels.

With features such as mentions tracking, message inbox consolidation, and easy collaboration with team members, you're armed with everything you need to execute a successful social media strategy.

Getting comfortable with the tools will empower you to exploit Zoho Social to its fullest potential.

title: An all in one social media management…
text:
An all in one social media management and scheduling powerhouse.
As an organisation we've tried a lot of tools to manage our social media but never have we stayed with a tool until we found Zoho Social! Great tool

Team should learn to Keep it simple.

title: Zoho to manage all of my social posting.
text: I've started using Zoho for all of my social media posts and I'm loving it.  Super easy to load up posts for the weeks and months ahead, and just as easy to make any last minute edits.  Very happy so far.

title: One stop tool for Social Media
text:
I have been using Zoho Social for few months now, and i can say with confidence that i have not used a product like this yet. I have used some other social tools, but they all have restrictions one way or the other. Whereas, the Zoho Social Allows you to add multiple channels in free tier as well.

The feature i like the most is Common dashboard, customized content for each channel for a single post.

I would recommend all to alteast try Zoho Social once.

title: Zoho Social works well for us
text: We like Zoho Social as a social media management tool as it integrates well with all the channels we use and the reports that are provided help us understand what is working.

title: I’ve been a Zoho One user for 12 years
text: I’ve been a Zoho One user for 12 years, and while the suite includes Zoho Creator, I don’t recommend it if your mobile app depends on external API calls. Integrations in Zoho Creator can be cost‑prohibitive due to what Support describes as a “limitation,” though I see it as part of their business model — one based on usage‑based billing. In my case, this hidden cost structure caused my subscription to rise from $53 per user per month to nearly $7,000 per year. Now you know.

title: I usually publish on 7 social channels…
text: I usually publish on 7 social channels at once, and occasionally, what I publish is time sensitive. This app is really saving me a lot of time. I can see the number of characters left to publish on each channel., which helps optimizing publications too. The premium plan enables me to save pictures for the post, which also saves a lot of time. Only one improvement would be welcome : I would like to be able to schedule every three months. Right now, I can only schedule weekly or monthly publications.

title: Incredibly slow email
text:
Incredibly slow email, regularly doesn't send, times out, emails lost. 

When contacting support all they said was "is the same for everyone"

Terrible

title: QuickBooks Online Integration is a plus
text: We have used Quickbooks Online in the past for expenses and receipt submission.  Zoho has made that task way easier.

title: It is literally impossible to cancel…
text:
It is literally impossible to cancel the subscription because I can't spend my entirely life working it out.

I have been looking for 15 minutes of my life that I will never get back and it is now entirely wasted. Even if I can find it now, what is the company going to do, give me this time of my life back?

No, I've resorted to cancelling my DD instead. If some actual working instructions are given to me I might be able to look more charitably, instead I think most likely this is the sort of company that will work around my DD cancellation.

So what option am I going to have other than to share this terrible experience.

title: Save your money and time
text: Save your money and time. Don't use Zoho One premium. There is nothing premium about Zoho changing the appointment times, that must be scheduled 24 hour in advance. The premium is relationship manager doesn't respond, multiple spam emails, but nothing of value or anyone to assist.

title: It has the most over complicated sign…
text: It has the most over complicated sign it procedure, you get stuck in circular codes and apps don't communicate with log ins. QR codes take you to unrecognised sites, If you want quick easy access this is not for you and oh my days if you get a new phone....

title: Always have been a happy user until I…
text:
Always have been a happy user until I upgraded to the paid platforms and everything started going to go downhill pretty fast. Looks like this company is growing to quick and can’t provide a good backbone for its servives or customer support. 

I would have given it another chance if support wasn’t so rubbish.

title: It was really easy to use and set up…
text:
It was really easy to use and set up and pretty intuitive which is great and it mean there was no steep learning curve and could just get stuck in.
It massively help streamline posting to social media, we a very small team and being able to see post and create them all in one place is a real time saver.

Like all of these service it can get pricey but compared to other service I looked at this seems more reasonable but there probably still a few features missing.

title: Zoho to manage all of my social posting.
text: I've started using Zoho for all of my social media posts and I'm loving it.  Super easy to load up posts for the weeks and months ahead, and just as easy to make any last minute edits.  Very happy so far.

title: ZOHO SOCIALS MAKES ME MORE PRODUCTIVE
text: My experience so far since I have been using Zoho Social has been great. It is easy to navigate and use. It does not take too much time to train my staff on how to use it. Also, the access to useful tools has made my company more productive.

title: we are using zoho social for quite some…
text: we are using zoho social for quite some time now and we are fully satisfies the way it has handled our social media platforms.

title: Zoho Social makes social posting a…
text:
Zoho Social makes social posting a bliss. 
I use it to post to two LinkedIn accounts and BlueSky. Zoho is very clear about the character limits. In addition, it let's me plan my posts in advance.
Finally, it responds fast and has a clear interface, it is so much easier than posting directly on LinkedIn. Resulting in that I have come to like social media postings.

title: Be careful with Zoho
text: Be careful with Zoho. When you encounter an issue, their support team often does not respond and will close your tickets without providing any replies. You may end up losing your money without receiving a solution.

title: Extremely bad support
text:
Extremely bad support. Took a week to get answer from 1st tier who clearly didn’t even botherto read (let alone understand) the request. More than 2 more weeks to get another answer. Still waiting.

Prime example of company you definitely should not buy your services from.Avoid.

title: I am currently paying for another tool…
text: I am currently paying for another tool for another brand that I manage. I've been comparing features, and so far Zoho Social does everything I need. It's easy to use, feature-rich, and makes life simpler for my small business.

title: Paid on Feb 4th, but Zoho claims failure and ignores support requests
text:
I am extremely disappointed with the current state of Zoho's support. On February 4th, my annual Workdrive subscription fee was deducted from my business bank account. Despite this, I am receiving daily automated emails claiming the payment failed and that my account will be downgraded.

The emails mention a failed credit card transaction, but I have never used a credit card for this service. I have tried reaching out via phone and email multiple times to provide proof of payment, but I have received zero response.

It is unacceptable for a business-critical service to ignore paid customers and threaten to downgrade their account due to their own administrative errors. I have the PDF proof of payment ready. Please contact me immediately to resolve this.

title: Zohomail was once free and cheap and…
text: Zohomail was once free and cheap and generally nothing, but their policy of paying for one e-mail is utter impudence. I switched to another email provider with which I do not experience such problems

title: I have used Zoho for a few years now…
text: I have used Zoho for a few years now and it really helps me manage my social media posts in one place.  I often recommend it to startups who don't have time to navigate across lots of platforms.

title: After trying to implement the software…
text: After trying to implement the software across our organization for 6 months we are giving up. The customer service is extremely disrespectful showing up for meeting late and not preparing for the meeting. If you don’t want to waste your time, be treated terribly and waste thousands of dollars do not choose this company or software.
